summary: Intel surged +24.89% after blowout Q1 — Data Center & AI revenue +22% to $5.05B, a read-through positive for AMD EPYC demand. NVIDIA Q1 Data Center revenue exceeded $30B with 75%+ gross margins, maintaining overwhelming AI GPU dominance. AMD positioned as preferred second supplier for cost-aware hyperscalers. Custom silicon from cloud providers (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium) emerging as the bigger long-term threat to both NVIDIA and AMD.
